name: navigation-menu-demo
visual_summary: A navigation menu allows users to traverse and access multiple views or pages within an application. It typically consists of a collapsible or expandable list of menu items displayed as links or buttons. Developers would use this component to provide easy navigation for users and improve the user experience.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready navbar component with the following characteristics:

Name: navigation-menu-demo
Description: A navigation menu allows users to traverse and access multiple views or pages within an application. It typically consists of a collapsible or expandable list of menu items displayed as links or buttons. Developers would use this component to provide easy navigation for users and improve the user experience.
Style: modern, flat, compact
Interactions: clickable, hover
Tags: navigation, menu, responsive, collapsible, expandable

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
